items.title: AWS Introduces Amazon S3 Annotations
items.summaryShort: AWS Introduces Amazon S3 Annotations. AWS recently announced Amazon S3 Annotations, a feature that lets teams attach rich, searchable context such as summaries, classifications, compliance data, or AI-generated insights directly to S3 objec

items.title: Claude Reaches GA on Microsoft Foundry: European Enterprises Cannot Deploy It
items.summaryShort: Claude Reaches GA on Microsoft Foundry: European Enterprises Cannot Deploy It. Claude models reached GA on Microsoft Foundry with Azure-native billing and governance, but no European data zone exists.

items.title: Cycle Introduces EU Control Plane as Sovereignty Debate Continues
items.summaryShort: Cycle Introduces EU Control Plane as Sovereignty Debate Continues. Cycle recently introduced a separate EU-based control plane, allowing European customers to keep platform management data and telemetry within Europe.

items.title: Cloudflare Details Unified Data Platform Where Billing Workloads Account for 53% of Queries
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Details Unified Data Platform Where Billing Workloads Account for 53% of Queries. Cloudflare details Town Lake, an internal unified data platform, and Skipper, an AI analytics agent unifying access to operational, billing, securi

items.title: Hardwood Promises High-Speed JVM Apache Parquet Processing with Zero Mandatory Dependencies
items.summaryShort: Hardwood Promises High-Speed JVM Apache Parquet Processing with Zero Mandatory Dependencies. Hardwood, the project Gunnar Morling kick-started to improve the handling of Parquet files in Java, reached version 1.

items.title: Uber’s European expansion plans may have hit a speed bump
items.summaryShort: Uber’s European expansion plans may have hit a speed bump. Back in February, Uber announced ambitious plans to launch in seven new European markets in 2026 — but now five of those launches are reportedly on hold.

items.title: Trump memecoin investors lost $3.8 billion, analysis finds
items.summaryShort: Trump memecoin investors lost $3.8 billion, analysis finds. Nearly 1 million people have lost a total of $3.8 billion after buying President Donald Trump’s $TRUMP memecoin, while Trump made $636 million.

items.title: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
items.summaryShort: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk. These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk.
